options.command: pnpm tsc -p tsconfig.user-service.json && pnpm tsc-alias -p tsconfig.user-service.json

pnpx prisma generate --schema=apps/user-service/prisma/schema.prisma && TS_NODE_PROJECT=tsconfig.user-service.json node --watch -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/user-service/src/main.ts
